body.name: searchInsert

body.focus: left, right = 0, len(nums) - 1

value.focus: left, right = 0, len(nums) - 1

body.focus: mid = (left + right) // 2

value.focus: mid = (left + right) // 2
nums[mid]

body.focus: return mid

value.focus: return mid
nums[mid]

body.focus: left = mid + 1

value.focus: left = mid + 1
right = mid - 1

body.focus: return left

value.focus: return left
